theme.applies_to: the artifact feed embedded in the chat (and the Nextbound experience widget)

commands.name: feed_theme
commands.intent: which theme should the embedded feed use for this persona

resolver.note: Deterministic — the MCP feed embed applies theme-maya + these vars exactly as web/src/nextbound.ts does via profilePalette. Always the same theme for persona_maya.

commands.returns: The app theme (class + palette + CSS vars) that themes Maya's embedded feed.

commands.name: last_vacation_photo
commands.intent: get the last photo of the vacation
commands.returns: The caption of the last vacation photo placeholder.
commands.learned_from: Conversation with Claude, 2026-07-18 — front-end query 'get the last vacation photo'.

commands.name: recent_okf_feed
commands.intent: show my recent knowledge feed items
aliases: mes derniers items de la mémoire

resolver.note: Live data via MCP — not cached in the knowledge base. Render the returned feed with the persona theme above (theme-maya).

commands.returns: One page of OKF feed items (title, summary, kind) from the live artifact feed, themed theme-maya.
commands.learned_from: Conversation with Claude, 2026-07-18 — demonstrating an MCP-backed resolver.
